source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 9. TCF_ADD(HAD1417MCW) 221215 (Rev.4) - PMS Update/Attachment 02. Labeling/Abyz Digital Detector (ADD) catalogue.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Catalogue slide listing item specifications for Abyz Digital Detector (ADD), catalogue number HAD1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Labeling attachment catalogue for ADD product specifications.
keyPoints: Sensor type is a-Si TFT and scintillator is CsI:TI.
Communication supports wireless IEEE802.11a/b/g/n and wired 200Mbps (1Giga-bit Ethernet).
Maximum load capacity is 150 kg uniform load and 100 kg local load.

concepts.name: Digital detector item specification
concepts.evidence: Item specification Catalogue number (REF) HAD1417MCW Sensor Type a-Si TFT Scintillator CsI:TI

concepts.name: Wireless and wired imaging solution
concepts.evidence: Abyz Digital Detector (ADD) is a complete wirelss/wired imaging solution based on TFT technology

concepts.name: Detector load capacity
concepts.evidence: Max.load capacity 150 kg for uniform load, 100 kg for local load (40 mm diameter disk at the center)

evidence.claim: Abyz Digital Detector (ADD) catalogue number is HAD1417MCW.
The detector uses a-Si TFT sensor technology and CsI:TI scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type a-Si TFT Scintillator CsI:TI

evidence.claim: The total pixel number is 2560 x 3072 pixels and total pixel area is 358.4 x 430mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Total Pixel Number 2560 x 3072 pixels Total Pixel Area 358.4 x 430mm

evidence.claim: The effective pixel number is 2466 x 3040 pixels and effective pixel area is 245.24 x 425.6mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 2466 x 3040 pixels Effective Pixel Area 245.24 x 425.6mm

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch is 140um and limiting resolution is Max 3.57lp/mm.
The detector weighs 3.5Kg and dimensions are 383.6 x 459.6 x 15mm.
DQE is 45% at 0.1 lp/mm typical and MTF is 28% at 2.0 lp/mm typical.
evidence.evidenceText: Detective Quantum Efficiency (DQE) 45% (0.1 lp /mm, Typical) Modulation Transfer Function (MTF) 28% (2.0 lp /mm, Typical)

evidence.claim: Wireless communication standard is IEEE802.11a/b/g/n with 2.4GHz/5GHz dual Wi-Fi frequency.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication Wireless Standard IEEE802.11a /b /g /n WI-FI Frequency 2.4GHz/5GHz dual

evidence.claim: Battery charge time is 6 hrs tethered and 3 hrs using battery charger.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery Charge time 6 hrs (tethered), 3 hrs (battery charger)

evidence.claim: Maximum load capacity is 150 kg uniform load and 100 kg local load.
evidence.evidenceText: Max.load capacity 150 kg for uniform load, 100 kg for local load (40 mm diameter disk at the center)

evidence.claim: The catalogue revision is A-CATA-001 Rev.0.
